name: hrevn-aer-verifier
description: Inspect the internal integrity of HREVN Agent Evaluation Record bundles.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect integrity metadata in synthetic AER bundles.
interface.longDescription: Use local Python tools to inspect bundle structure, checksums, root hashes, evidence inventories, and embedded anchor metadata without claiming on-chain verification or regulatory compliance.
defaultPrompt: Verify the internal integrity of this AER bundle.
Inspect this AER bundle's evidence inventory.
Report embedded anchor metadata without a chain claim.
